privileged_info_summary: The task involves a synthetic three-service Docker Compose application with three intentional bugs. The application directory is /home/ga/app-debug containing Flask API, Nginx reverse proxy (listening on port 8080), and MySQL database services. The three bugs in the docker-compose.yml are: (1) Flask MYSQL_HOST environment variable set to 'localhost' instead of 'db', (2) Flask service configured only on the frontnet network but missing the required backnet network connection to reach the database, (3) the docker-compose.yml file references a db_data volume but lacks a top-level volumes: declaration section.
